content:
# Multi-Spoke Spawning: Verified (2026-03-28)

Spawned test spoke container from hub devcontainer. Full stack works:
- Auth: .credentials.json via host path mount = authenticated
- Repo: Fresh git clone --depth 1 works. Worktrees fail (absolute .git paths)
- Network: Spoke reaches hub at http://app:8020 via compose network
- MCP: corvia_system_status returned live data from spoke

Docker-from-Docker: bind mounts must use HOST paths. Resolve via docker inspect $(hostname).
Decision: fresh clone over worktrees for container isolation.

## Inference Crash Pattern (corvia-dev restart)
After corvia-dev restart, inference process loads embedding + chat models, then crashes (exit 1) ~4s after chat model loads. Restarted process starts gRPC server but never reloads models. Root cause: likely race condition during rapid restart cycles. Clean restart after settling resolves it.
